Sports Scene

Copied

The competitions will continue at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics on Saturday night with more gold medals decided in the French capital. CGTN Sports Scene has the rundown for all of the finals taking place in the evening session on the first full day of competition at the Games.

The men's skateboarding street final will begin at 17:00 (GMT+2) at the Place de la Concord.

In swimming, the mens and women's 400-meter freestyle finals will take place at the Olympic Aquatics Centre in the Paris La Defense Arena at 20:42 (GMT+2), followed by the men's and women's 4Ã100-meter freestyle relay finals at 21:34 (GMT+2).

And the women's fencing epee individual gold medal bout will get underway at the Grand Palais at 21:30 (GMT+2).
